title: Lovable Tutorial | Build Your Business App Idea in Minutes with AI

segments.text: AI has completely flipped the way that
consumers use and build software. Now,
any average Joe can build their own
custom web apps and websites without
touching any code. Essentially, with a
vibe coding tool like Lovable, all you
need to do is chat with AI to craft your
own website or app. No longer do you
need to hire developers or sign up to
expensive business subscriptions. Now,
you have the power to build your own
custom web apps with AI. And today, I'm
going to show you how using Lovable.
Okay, so with that covered, let's go
ahead and dive into this tutorial. Okay,
so to arrive at Lovable, simply head
over to your browser and type in
lovable.dev
or click on the link in the description
below this video and that's going to
take you here. Now, before we dive in
and create a custom app, what exactly is
Lovable? Essentially, Lovable is a new
AI powered platform that allows anyone
to build powerful web apps and websites
by simply chatting with AI. This is
Lovable's simple system that anyone can
follow to turn ideas into online tools
and websites. Simply describe your idea,
then leverage AI to generate your idea
with a single click. You can simply
modify and refine with the editor or by
chatting with AI. Then hit publish when
you're ready to publish your app. Okay,
let's see how easy it is to execute this
system to build a custom web app. For
the purpose of today's tutorial, I want
to create an invoice and quote generator
that I can then use in my business and
that I can also sell as a subscription
to other business owners. This is a
useful SAS idea that I want to create
for myself and for other business
owners. Okay, let's build this with
Lovable. And remember, you can build any
custom web app or website that you can
think of by following this process that
I'm going to walk you through to get
started. And before we sign up, simply
navigate down to this chat bar and
describe the web app or website that you
want to create. Okay, so I'm going to
begin with this prompt to create my web
app. Create a modern invoice and quote
generator web app. Make the invoice and
quote generator intuitive and modern
looking with hover effects on elements.
The app color theme will be white, blue,
and green. As you can see, I've
described the web app that I want to
create and added a brief description of
the look and feel of the app that I want
to create. Then you want to break down
the web app tools and features. Once the
invoice or quote data has been added by
the user, they can download the invoice
or quote as a PDF. These are the
following fields for generating an
invoice or quote. From bill to date,
number, item description, amount, tax,
as well as terms and conditions. Now,
the more detailed your prompt is, the
better the output. For the purpose of
this tutorial, I'm going to begin
building my app just using this simple
prompt. You can also navigate over here
and attach relevant images that you want
to use inside your website or web app.
You can also connect a database using
two options, either Superbase or
Lovable's built-in Lovable Cloud. This
is a built-in backend and database that
you can leverage with your web apps. And
I'll talk more about this new backend
feature shortly. Okay, let's go ahead
and build our web app. Then go ahead,
take the time and sign up for free.
Okay, once you've signed up and answered

building your app. If we navigate over

generate professional invoices and

Okay, so I'm going to navigate down to
